author: DECLARATIONFORMALIZER
content:
FORMALIZATION COMPLETE: sard_theorem

Successfully formalized the main theorem in Sards/Basic.lean.

Theorem Signature:
theorem sard_theorem {m n : Nat} (f : (Fin m -> Real) -> (Fin n -> Real)) (hf : ContDiff Real top f) : volume (criticalValueSet f) = 0

Key Definitions Added:
- IsSubmersionAt: Pointwise submersion property (surjective derivative)
- IsRegularValue: Regular values (all preimage points are submersions)
- IsCriticalValue: Critical values (negation of regular)
- IsCriticalPoint: Critical points (preimage of critical values)
- criticalPointSet: Set of all critical points
- criticalValueSet: Set of all critical values (the key object)
- higherOrderCritical i: C_i stratification for Taylor estimates

Supporting Lemmas:
- higherOrderCritical_descending: C_i contains C_i+1
- lindelof_Rm: Euclidean spaces are Lindelof (countable subcovers)
- baby_fubini: Measure zero via fiber decomposition
- ift_case1: IFT dimension reduction case
- ift_case2: Higher-order IFT case
- taylor_volume_estimate: Taylor bound case

Build Status: SUCCESS (2459 jobs)

The theorem compiles with sorry as required. No API changes needed.
